current_life_events: The performance review is now just two days away, and he's been rehearsing his self-assessment, feeling like he's under a microscope; his friend's visit last week still has him questioning his career trajectory and lifestyle choices.
mental_state: Intensely self-critical and preoccupied with potential outcomes of the review, feeling like his entire professional identity is on the line.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The looming review and recent social comparison with his friend are exacerbating his deep-seated fears of failure, inadequacy, and stagnation, while also triggering health and body image concerns due to increased stress and self-scrutiny.
